description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora:latest Docker image and a global before_script that installs dnf-command(copr), git, libtool, make, libasan, orc-devel, python3, python3-six, python3-pyparsing, glib-networking, enables the @spice/nightly COPR repository, and installs build dependencies for spice. Define four jobs that all run in the default stage: check-valgrind runs dnf install the rpmfusion free release, dnf debuginfo-install spice-server glib2, installs valgrind and GStreamer packages, configures the build with CFLAGS='-O2 -pipe -g -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=0' ./autogen.sh --enable-valgrind --enable-extra-checks, then runs make and make check-valgrind, failing with the test log if needed; makecheck runs ./autogen.sh with address sanitizer flags (CFLAGS='-O2 -pipe -g -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wframe-larger-than=40920' LDFLAGS='-fsanitize=address -lasan'), then make and make -C server check, outputting the server test log on failure; options runs ./autogen.sh --enable-statistics --without-sasl, then make and make -C server check, also showing the server test log on failure; syntax-check runs ./autogen.sh followed by make syntax-check.
